entry.defn: number five noun music note of the scale in gongchepu (工尺谱), corresponding to 6 in numbered musical notation
number eight

number 1 one 2 first 3 single; alone; only one 4 same 5 whole; all; throughout 6 every time 7 also; otherwise 8 concentrated; wholehearted 9 [indicating that the action occurs just once or lasts for a short time] a [in the middle of a reduplicated verb] b [between a verb and a verbal measure] 10 [before a verb or a verbal measure to indicate an action to be followed by a result] 11 [before a verb or an adjective, indicating the suddenness or thoroughness of an action or a change in the situation] adverb once; as soon as preposition per; a auxiliary literary [before certain words for emphasis] noun music note of the scale in gongchepu (工尺谱), corresponding to 7 in numbered musical notation

pronoun 1 he; him; his 2 [for either sex when it is either unknown or unimportant] 3 [before or after a person's name for emphasis] 4 [used as a meaningless object, for emphasis or in fun] 5 usually literary other; another; some other noun (Tā) a surname
pronoun she; her

adjective 1 big; large; great (opp. 小) 2 heavy (rain, etc.); strong (wind, etc.) (opp. 小) 3 loud (opp. 小) 4 general; main; major 5 (of age, usu. of a child or youth) old (opp. 小) 6 eldest 7 courteous your adverb 1 greatly; fully 2 in a big way; on a big (or large) scale; with all-out efforts; vigorously 3 [before a time word, etc. to show emphasis] noun dialect 1 father 2 father's brother; uncle

noun 1 fish 两条∼ Liǎng tiáo ∼ two fish 一群∼ yī qún ∼ a school (or shoal) of fish 一尾∼ yī wěi ∼ a fish ∼与熊掌, 不可兼得。 ∼ yǔ xióngzhǎng, bùkě jiāndé. One cannot serve God and Mammon. 2 flesh of fish; fish (as food) 冻∼ dòng∼ frozen fish 鲜∼ xiān∼ fresh fish 3 (∼) a surname
pronoun 1 you [second person plural] 2 colloquial [in the same way as 你 1 2]
adjective 1 busy; fully occupied (opp. 闲) 2 imperative; anxious verb 1 hurry; hasten; make haste 2 work; do

pronoun we; us

verb thank

auxiliary 1 [at the end of a special, alternative, or rhetorical question] 2 [at the end of a declarative sentence to reinforce the assertion] 3 [at the end of a declarative sentence to indicate the continuation of an action or a state] 4 [used to mark a pause]
number six noun music note of the scale in gongchepu (工尺谱), corresponding to 5 in numbered musical notation
number seven noun folk tradition memorial ceremony held every seven days for a person after his death till the forty-ninth day (断七), the seventh (七)
number 1 nine 2 each of the nine nine-day periods beginning the day after the Winter Solstice adjective many; numerous

common phrase polite expression 1 you're welcome; don't mention it; not at all 2 [used to decline an offer] please don't bother; no, thanks adjective 1 impolite; rude; blunt 2 candid; frank; straightforward
verb 1 study; learn 2 emulate; imitate
noun Chinese (language)
adjective 1 difficult; hard; troublesome (opp. 易) 2 hardly possible; unavoidable 3 bad; unpleasant verb put sb. into a difficult position
pronoun 1 they or them (referring to people) 2 [before or after nouns for emphasis] 3 [after the name or title of a person] and the others

noun 1 question; problem; issue 2 problem; contradiction; issue 3 key; crucial point 4 trouble; mishap

1 of; ~'s (possessive particle) 2 (used after an attribute when it modifies a noun) 3 (used at the end of a declarative sentence for emphasis) 4 (used after a noun, verb or adjective to form a nominal expression, as in 皮革的pígéde [皮革的] "one made of leather" or 跑堂儿的pǎotángrde [跑堂儿的] "a waiter (literally, one who runs back and forth in a restaurant)" or 新的xīnde [新的] "new one") 5 also pr. [dì] or [di] in poetry and songs

verb 1 come (to); arrive 2 cause to come; happen; crop up; take place 3 obtain; get 4 [as a substitute for some other verb] 5 [with 得 or 不, indicating possibility or impossibility, capability or incapability] 6 [before a verb, indicating an intended or suggested action] 7 [after a verb or verbal expression] come in order to 8 [between two verbs or verbal expressions to indicate the purpose of the former] in order to 9 (of electricity, tap water, gas, etc.) be on again auxiliary 1 colloquial [at the end of a sentence to indicate what has happened in the past, same as 来着] 2 [after a time expression, indicating a period of time that extends from the past up to the present] ever since 3 [after a round number or after a numeral plus a measure] approximately; about; around; round 4 [after the numerals 一, 二, and 三, indicating points in an explanation or argument] adjective future; coming; next noun (Lái) a surname auxiliary [as a syllable filler in folk ballads]
